author: Haroen Viaene
subject: refactor(utils): make code style consistent (#5107)
body:
* refactor(utils): make code style consistent

Unfortunately these changes are hard to split up, as every other tweak happened after verifying the imports were correctly changed.

- convert all utils functions to named exports
- convert multiline arrow utility functions to function expressions
- sort exports in utils/index.ts
- remove convertNumericRefinementsToFilters (no longer needed since #5085)
- use `toArray` in more cases and improve its type
- move createHelpers-tests to the right folder
- use typedObject.keys in one more case
- improve internal typing in highlight components
- fix type of escapeFacetValue (boolean is also used in toggleRefinement)
- consolidate html escaping in a single file
- import utilities from the barrel entry file throughout source code
- remove wrong `@jest-environment` pragma in non-test files

* begone, circule

* whoops, more circle to avoid

* oh yes global unescape is deadly

* less narrow bundlesize (due to different gzip i think)

* more correct toArray type
